title: autofs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[5.1.4-114.0.1.5]
- Add autofs-5.0.5-lookup-mounts.patch [Orabug:12658280]

[5.1.4-114.el8_10.5]
- RHEL-111930 - automount blocked when attempting to lookup ldap maps
  - fix missing unlock in sasl_do_kinit_ext_cc().
- Resolves: RHEL-111930
full_text:
[5.1.4-114.0.1.5]
- Add autofs-5.0.5-lookup-mounts.patch [Orabug:12658280]

[5.1.4-114.el8_10.5]
- RHEL-111930 - automount blocked when attempting to lookup ldap maps
  - fix missing unlock in sasl_do_kinit_ext_cc().
- Resolves: RHEL-111930

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-17414.html
